---
title: "ENVS 193DS Spring 2026 Final"
author: "Elena Donelson"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
editor: source
---

[Link to GitHub repository](https://github.com/elenadonelson/ENVS-193DS_spring-2026_final.git)

# Setup

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# loading packages
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(gt)
library(here)

# reading in data
est_data <- read_csv(here("data", "nest_data_final.csv"))
```
